Title: Anno 117: Pax Romana - Launch Day
Description: Game released on PC / PS5 / Xbox Series X|S. Version 1.2 was already included at launch with various bug fixes and rebalancing based on playtest feedback

Title: Multiplayer Hotfix
Description: Hotfix released on PC to fix several causes for desyncs in multiplayer. Crossplay temporarily disabled until all platforms updated. Console patch followed within days

Title: Patch 1.3 Notes Published
Description: Official patch notes for version 1.3 published on the website ahead of release

Title: Patch 1.3 Release
Description: Fixed several crashes and performance issues. Fixed various causes for desyncs. Re-enabled crossplay for Xbox. Added various text and localization fixes. Fixed missing deities from Religion menu. Fixed blueprint upgrade issue for slot buildings. Fixed audio corruption in long play sessions

Title: Patch 1.3.2 Notes Published
Description: Official patch notes for version 1.3.2 published ahead of release

Title: Patch 1.3.2 Release
Description: Fixes for crashes and the global deity buff. Balancing changes. Additional desync fixes for multiplayer

Title: Patch 1.4 Notes Published
Description: Full patch notes for version 1.4 published

Title: Patch 1.4 + Marvellous Mosaic Pack (Cosmetic DLC)
Description: Patch 1.4 adds support for the Marvellous Mosaic Pack Cosmetic DLC. Fixed escort-type quests. Fixed silo bonus bug. Fixed street range indicators. Fixed high mouse input lag on PS5. More desync fixes. First Cosmetic DLC release with additional groundplates and mosaics for Latium and Albion

Title: Patch 1.4.1 Release
Description: Addresses an issue with raytracing on consoles and a desync related to the Marvellous Mosaic Pack CDLC

Title: Release Delay Announced
Description: DLC Prophecies of Ash and Patch 1.5 delayed by one week to April 30th due to a potentially savegame-breaking issue

Title: Patch 1.5 Notes Published
Description: Full patch notes for version 1.5 published ahead of release

Title: Patch 1.5 + Prophecies of Ash DLC
Description: First paid DLC for Anno 117: Pax Romana. Adds a new volcano island (Cinis) with volcanic eruption mechanics and new resource obsidian. Largest island in the game. Patch 1.5 includes large number of quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes

Title: Update 1.5 HotFix (PC)
Description: PC hotfix released fixing a crash for campaign savegames upon loading and a crash related to defeating a rival

Title: Upcoming Patches - Message from Anno Team
Description: Team acknowledged issues with Update 1.5 launch. Announced upcoming patch 1.5.1.1 with additional fixes

Title: Patch 1.5.1 Release
Description: Bug fixes including for ships on trade routes amphitheatre events and trade route filters

Title: Patch 1.5.2 Notes Published
Description: Full patch notes for version 1.5.2 published

Title: Patch 1.5.2 Release
Description: Fixes for ships renaming themselves. Adjustments to rivals behaviour related to wars. Fixes for flickering ground plates. Fixes for dead harbour tiles. Additional announcement of upcoming Hippodrome DLC
